query: v1.1 release readiness and tag gate
slice_title: Cut v1.1.0 tag only after command surface and agent tooling gates pass
goal: Record progress for `v1.1 release readiness and tag gate`.
description: Local release gate passed, but v1.1.0 tag was not created because the release commit is 20 commits ahead of origin/main and GitHub CI has not run on it.
note: No v1.1.0 tag created. Push main, verify CI, then tag.
tests_run: go test -coverprofile coverage.out ./... (package tests passed; local toolchain missing covdata caused command exit 1)
go test -race -coverprofile coverage.out ./... blocked locally: gcc missing for cgo on Windows
ds map --json --no-refresh parses and returns areas

learnings.summary: Do not cut v1.1.0 locally while main is ahead of origin; push main and wait for CI before tagging.
